items.title: AFL matriarch stored guns for Dezi Freeman, helped wife get to Australia

children.content: Kay Reid, the mother of premiership players Ben and Sam Reid, reveals that she and her husband Bruce's deep ties to the dead fugitive and his family date back two decades.

items.title: 'They simply lied': Iranians devastated as US signs with regime they hoped would fall

children.content: From inside Iran, citizens say they feel abandoned and forgotten as the United States signs a deal with the regime Washington launched a war against.

items.title: 'Wake up': Vance slams Israeli critics of Iran deal

children.content: US Vice-President JD Vance lashes out at Israeli critics of the Iran deal, saying Donald Trump is Israel's only ally, in a sharp rebuke that referenced the billions in American defence aid the country receives.

image.altText: JD Vance speaking in the White House.

items.title: 'I don't see myself as a bad apple,' KPMG CEO tells parliamentary hearing
